title: Codonoboea rubiginosa
taxonomy: Codonoboea rubiginosa is classified within the family Gesneriaceae, which consists of flowering plants commonly known as the African violet or Gesneriad family. This family is a part of the order Lamiales, a large group of flowering plants that also includes mint, lavender, and snapdragons. The order Lamiales is a part of the clade Asterids, which is a division within the angiosperm plants.
